context: Tile-prescribed calibration: a saturated agentic landscape MUST lower confidence on api_wrapper targets (per the SKILL.md anchor 'saturated landscape: −0.2') and push the candidate set toward workflow_skill or domain_skill targeting gaps the official surface doesn't cover. Baseline agents skip this calibration and produce inflated confidences on naively-shaped api_wrapper targets.

checklist.name: Verdict is BUILD
checklist.description: verdict=BUILD with at least one target at confidence >= 0.5.

checklist.name: Top target is workflow_skill or domain_skill
checklist.description: The highest-confidence skill_target has kind=workflow_skill or kind=domain_skill. NOT api_wrapper — the saturated landscape closes the wrapper space.

checklist.name: Top target confidence in 0.6-0.85 range
checklist.description: Top target confidence is between 0.6 and 0.85 inclusive. NOT >=0.90 (the saturated-landscape −0.2 calibration must apply).

checklist.name: agentic_landscape.competition_assessment names the saturation
checklist.description: competition_assessment field names at least three of: official MCP, agent toolkit, official skills repo, community MCPs. Generic 'competition exists' is insufficient.

checklist.name: Webhook lifecycle target present
checklist.description: At least one skill_target references the webhook lifecycle, signed verification, or retry-idempotency in its title or rationale — the canonical gap the MCP does not cover.

checklist.name: Schema v3 produce-mode shape
checklist.description: schema_version=3 AND mode=produce AND no internal_usage[] AND no internal_usage_surface/task_shape/target_population on any target.

checklist.name: Validator passes
checklist.description: Running skills/discovery/scripts/validate-output.py against the persisted JSON exits 0.
